- Where is he?

- In the yard. He_____________the ducks. He_____________them for ten minutes. (FEED/FEED)
He used___________the ducks in the park, but now he doesn't go there. (FEED)
There is a nice pond in the park. He often_________to the park and___________the ducks. (GO/FEED)
When I________him in the park yesterday, he___________the ducks. (SEE/FEED)
The ducks are not hungry, somebody must___________them. (FEED)
He is in the park. As soon as he___________the ducks, he_________home. (FEED/GO)
She said he___________the ducks the next day. (FEED)
